Day advanced to 2026-03-26.
10,052 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-25 -> 2026-03-26)

- "Which England defender will score the hosts' only goal and later concede a stoppage-time penalty in the men's friendly against Uruguay at Wembley by 28 March 2026?" → Ben White
- "Who will be identified in verified reporting by March 29, 2026, as the Israeli Premier League footballer shown opening fire in southern Lebanon?" → Menashe Zalka
- "What Iranian city will see six people killed after air raids hit three residential houses on March 27, 2026?" → Qom

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (323 resolved, 7 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
